title: Create New Digital Tactic with Validation

story.so_that: start capturing a new Digital Tactic
story.i_want: request a new tactic, selecting fixed info (like Tactic Type) from a list, and have the system validate selections, and edit the tactic before sending it to Proof-readers

journey.before: User is registered in the system and needs to create new Digital Tactics for distribution
journey.during: User selects tactic type from predefined list, sets start date, provides title, optionally assigns alternative owner, and edits tactic details before submission
journey.after: Tactic is created in DRAFT status with unique ID and sent to proof-readers for review

capability_breakdown.core_action: Create and submit a new Digital Tactic with validation
inputs: Owner (defaults to current user, can be overridden)
Tactic Type (from fixed list: CouponMachine, InternetPrintout, MobileCoupon)
outputs: Validation error messages if required fields missing
state_changes: Owner assigned (either user or alternative owner)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Submit new tactic with default owner
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am a registered Internal Requester And I provide Owner (defaulting to my user ID) And I provide Tactic Type And I provide Start Date And I provide Title When I submit the new Tactic Then the tactic is assigned a unique Id And the tactic is captured in DRAFT status
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Submit a new tactic with default owner and receive confirmation

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Submit new tactic with alternative owner
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am a registered Internal Requester And I provide Tactic Type And I provide Start Date And I provide Title And I provide an alternative Internal Owner When I submit the new Tactic Then the tactic is assigned a unique Id And the tactic is captured in DRAFT status And the alternative Owner is assigned as Current Owner And I am logged as the Requester
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Submit a new tactic with alternative owner and have ownership properly assigned

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Reject submission with missing required information
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am a registered Internal Requester And I do not provide all required Tactic Info When I attempt to submit the new Tactic Then the tactic is NOT assigned a unique Id And the tactic is NOT captured in DRAFT status And I receive a relevant warning message regarding the missing information
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Receive validation feedback when required fields are missing
